title: schoenus subbulbosus
intro: Schoenus subbulbosus, also known as the dwarf bulrush, is a type of sedge that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. It is native to Australia and has been used by indigenous communities for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Schoenus subbulbosus include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
